title: Audit Director
description:
Our client is a well-established mid-tier professional services firm in Singapore, part of a global accounting and advisory network. The firm has built a strong reputation for delivering high-quality audit, assurance, tax and advisory services to a diverse client base, ranging from SMEs to listed entities across multiple industries. With decades of industry presence, the firm is committed to professional excellence, innovation, and developing the next generation of leaders.

The Role
As Audit Director, you will play a pivotal role in leading a portfolio of statutory audits and special assurance engagements, ensuring the highest level of audit quality, risk management, and client satisfaction. Beyond technical expertise, you will be a trusted advisor to clients, a mentor to your team, and a key driver of the firm’s continued growth.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead and manage a portfolio of audit clients across various industries.

  • Oversee end-to-end external audit engagements: planning, risk assessment, fieldwork, and final reporting.

  • Serve as Engagement Partner, reviewing and approving audit documentation to ensure compliance with SFRS, auditing standards, and firm policies.

  • Ensure audit quality in line with ACRA regulations and uphold the System of Quality Management (ISQM 1 & 2).

  • Actively participate in consultations/EQCR processes as needed.

  • Build and maintain strong client relationships, providing guidance on financial reporting and compliance matters.

  • Drive business development through networking, proposals, and referrals.

  • Coach, develop, and retain a high-performing audit team, fostering a collaborative and growth-oriented culture.

  • Partner with fellow leaders to advance firm innovation and market presence.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Accountancy or equivalent, with a professional accounting qualification (ACCA, CPA Australia, ACA).

  • Chartered Accountant (Singapore), ISCA Member, and ACRA-registered Public Accountant with a current Practising Certificate.

  • Minimum 10 years of progressive experience with mid-tier or large public accounting firms, with recent leadership at Director/Partner level.

  • Strong technical knowledge of SFRS, auditing standards, and regulatory requirements.

  • Proven track record in client management, business development, and team leadership.

  • Excellent interpersonal, communication, and stakeholder management skills.

  • Bilingual (English and Mandarin preferred) to liaise with diverse client stakeholders.

  • Experience with listed companies or public interest entities will be an advantage.

  • Entrepreneurial mindset with high standards of integrity, accountability, and commitment to audit quality.


Working Location: Beach Road
Working Hours: Mon- Fri 8.30am- 5.30pm

To apply, kindly click APPLY NOW to submit your latest CV in Microsoft Words.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.



SATT

EA Registration No.: R1219605

EA License No.: 25C2695

postedCompany.description:
At Search Avenue Pte Ltd, we believe recruitment is more than just filling positions — it’s about building futures. Founded by two passionate individuals with over 12 years of recruitment experience, Search Avenue was born out of a shared vision: to raise the standards of recruitment through integrity, innovation, and unwavering dedication to people.

We are deeply committed to understanding the evolving needs of both employers and candidates. Our approach combines advanced technology with a human touch, ensuring personalized, efficient, and meaningful hiring experiences. Whether it’s permanent placements, executive searches, or talent mapping, our mission remains the same — to connect top-tier talent with companies that value diversity, capability, and culture fit.

Driven by our founders’ belief in work-life harmony, we champion flexible career opportunities and inclusive workplaces. Our goal is to empower individuals to thrive in their careers while honoring their personal commitments — and to help businesses grow stronger through passionate, high-performing teams.

At Search Avenue, recruitment is our craft — and people are our purpose.
postedCompany.name: SEARCH AVENUE PRIVATE LIMITED
